name: LoftType
summary: Specifies enumerated constants for all supported loft types.

enum_values.name: Normal
enum_values.summary: Uses chord-length parameterization in the loft direction.

enum_values.name: Loose
enum_values.summary: The surface is allowed to move away from the original curves to make a smoother surface. The surface control points are created at the same locations as the control points of the loft input curves.

enum_values.name: Tight
enum_values.summary: The surface sticks closely to the original curves. Uses square root of chord-length parameterization in the loft direction.

enum_values.name: Straight
enum_values.summary: The sections between the curves are straight. This is also known as a ruled surface.

enum_values.name: Uniform
enum_values.summary: Constructs a uniform loft. The object knot vectors will be uniform.
